title: Artificial eggs collector for common cuttlefish
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fdq78","text":"These protocols refer to a study having the aim to identify and test at field artificial structures suitable as collectors for common cuttlefish Sepia officinalis eggs in wild condition for restocking purpose.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":145,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1se5e","text":"During the same study, three different protocols were tested and compared. The 'seagrass' collector, the 'longline' collector and the 'trap' collector.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b22ic","text":"This work was supported by the project “Protection, improvement and integrated management of the sea environment and of cross-border natural resources – ECOSEA”, funded by EU Adriatic IPA Cross-border Cooperation 2007-2013 (2°ord./0236/0).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"68rr1","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Luca Bolognini
